title: Announcing Google Antigravity SDK
summary: Google Antigravity is an agentic development platform that extends IDE capabilities with agent-first workflows. Agents operate autonomously across editor, terminal, and browser to plan and execute complex software development tasks at a higher task-oriented abstraction level.
